summary: Backend regression testing for PathPilot /api/optimize endpoint. All 51 tests passed (1 skipped for Timefold). Verified: (1) lkh_tsp_solve sanitizes OSRM matrix before open-path zero-out, (2) three_opt_improve uses non-reversing A+C+B+D swap on asymmetric matrices, (3) auto algorithm resolves to vroom_lkh_3opt for >=11 stops, (4) PyVRP groups identical-coord stops as super-nodes. All algorithms (vroom, lkh, pyvrp, ortools, vroom_lkh_3opt) return Hamiltonian paths.
critical_code_review_comments: sanitize_osrm_matrix correctly handles None/negative/NaN values with PENALTY_SECONDS (999999)
three_opt_improve uses non-reversing A+C+B+D swap - safe for asymmetric OSRM matrices
Auto algorithm selection: >=11 stops -> vroom_lkh_3opt, <11 stops -> vroom/ortools
PyVRP duplicate-coord grouping preserves input order within super-nodes
All solvers return Hamiltonian paths (no dropped/duplicate stops)
test_credentials: DEV_MODE=true for testing, restored to DEV_MODE=false after tests
seed_data_creation: 12-stop and 30-stop SE Queensland test datasets seeded via /api/stops, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /api/optimize algorithms verified working. Test file test_optimize_api.py created for regression testing. OSRM service running on localhost:5000. DEV_MODE=false restored. No production user data was modified.

pytest_unit_tests.test_open_path_tsp.py: 12 passed - river-crossing matrix, open-path fix verified
pytest_unit_tests.test_solver_hamiltonicity.py: 13 passed (1 skipped) - all solvers preserve Hamiltonian path

api_integration_tests.test_optimize_api.py: 14 passed - algorithms endpoint, auto selection, individual algorithms, response structure, edge cases

algorithms_verified.auto: Resolves to vroom_lkh_3opt for >=11 stops, vroom/ortools for <11 stops
algorithms_verified.pyvrp: Returns Hamiltonian path with duplicate-coord grouping
algorithms_verified.vroom_lkh_3opt: Returns Hamiltonian path with time_savings field
algorithms_verified.three_opt: Does not crash on asymmetric OSRM matrix
